emails.subject: RE: Oman LNG Visit
emails.body: RE: Oman LNG Visit I am currently planning to be in Europe for most of that time, although I might be back in Houston. I should know in the next few days. Are the Omani's going to be here in Houston for the whole of that period? Thanks, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: Oman LNG Visit
emails.body: Oman LNG has decided that 2nd week of July works better for them. Please advise me regarding your availability during that time. Tenatively, the agenda would be: Dabhol Update Dabhol Implementation Procedures Visit to CMS Terminal Spot Cargoes Remaining in 2001 Spot Cargoes in 2002 and Beyond Please suggest other topics. Paul

emails.subject: RE: Oman LNG Visit
emails.body: July is currently wide open. Thanks, Jonathan
